notes: v0.5.6 — Live Render gets a model dropdown with 4 cost-tiered options. New default is Nano-Banana via Poe at $0.0023/render (HK$0.018), 17× cheaper than the previous CF AI Gateway path. Pricing observed empirically: Poe charges per-token at unified text rate, while Google direct charges $30/M (2.5 image) or $120/M (3-pro image) for image-output tokens. Privacy caveat: Poe-rendered images live on pfst.cf2.poecdn.net for hours-days; pick a CF Gateway option (gemini-2.5-flash-image / gemini-3-pro-image-preview) for confidential client work. UI now shows per-render cost in both USD and HKD next to the model name.
